inputs.label: Component Failure Rate
inputs.businessContext: The constant failure rate per component (λ) assuming exponential distribution.

businessContext_i18n.en: The constant failure rate per component (λ) assuming exponential distribution.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üstel dağılım varsayımıyla bileşen başına sabit arıza oranı (λ).
businessContext_i18n.de: Konstante Ausfallrate pro Komponente (λ) unter Annahme einer Exponentialverteilung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le taux de défaillance constant par composant (λ) supposant une distribution exponentielle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de fallos constante por componente (λ) asumiendo distribución exponencial.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل الفشل الثابت لكل مكون (λ) بافتراض التوزيع الأسي.

inputs.label: Mission Time
inputs.businessContext: The duration for which the system must operate without failure.

businessContext_i18n.en: The duration for which the system must operate without failure.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Dauer, in der das System ohne Ausfall arbeiten muss.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée pendant laquelle le système doit fonctionner sans panne.
businessContext_i18n.es: La duración durante la cual el sistema debe operar sin fallos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المدة التي يجب أن يعمل خلالها النظام دون فشل.

inputs.label: Number of Components in Series
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical components connected in series within each string.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical components connected in series within each string.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir dizede seri bağlı özdeş bileşen sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Komponenten, die in jedem Strang in Reihe geschaltet sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de composants identiques connectés en série dans chaque chaîne.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de componentes idénticos conectados en serie dentro de cada cadena.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المكونات المتطابقة المتصلة على التوالي داخل كل سلسلة.

inputs.label: Number of Parallel Strings
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical series strings operating in parallel (active redundancy).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical series strings operating in parallel (active redundancy).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paralel çalışan (aktif yedekleme) özdeş seri dize sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer in Reihe geschalteter Stränge, die parallel betrieben werden (aktive Redundanz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de chaînes série identiques fonctionnant en parallèle (redondance active).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cadenas en serie idénticas operando en paralelo (redundancia activa).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد سلاسل التوالي المتطابقة التي تعمل بالتوازي (تكرار نشط).
